headline: NASA selects Eric Schmidt's rocket company for a 2028 mission to Mars
summary: Relativity Space, co-founded by Eric Schmidt, will launch NASA's Aeolus payload to Mars in 2028. This mission is part of a new public-private partnership with NASA. Relativity Space will handle the spacecraft, rocket, and cruise operations for the mission.

headline: Hue's wired wall modules bring non-smart lights into its ecosystem
summary: Philips Hue has released its first wired wall modules. These modules allow non-smart lights to be integrated into the Hue ecosystem. New Play lamps and E14 bulb upgrades were also announced.

headline: The NTS Radio Player brings the best of internet radio to your hi-fi
summary: NTS Radio and Atonemo launched a dedicated player for NTS mixes and streams. It brings internet radio to almost any stereo or speaker setup. The player also supports popular streaming services via AirPlay 2, Google Cast, Spotify, and Tidal.

headline: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
summary: Luca Guadagnino's film "Artificial" about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman was dropped by Amazon MGM. The movie starred Andrew Garfield and covered Altman's 2023 termination and reinstatement. The project had been in development for about a year.

headline: Beat the Summer Heat With This $8 Portable Turbo Fan
summary: An $8 portable turbo fan is available for purchase. This deal is promoted as a way to stay cool during summer. It's likely part of a sale event.

headline: Save $100 Off a Pair of BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: BowFlex SelectTech Dumbbells are on sale for $100 off. The deal is available before Amazon Prime Day. It can still be delivered by Father's Day with free shipping.

headline: Save 50% Off a 12-Month Walmart+ Membership for Prime Day and Stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup
summary: Walmart+ membership is 50% off for Prime Day. Benefits include early access to deals, free shipping, and Paramount+. Members can also stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

headline: Save Nearly 60% Off the Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Pedal Set, Perfect for Forza Horizon 6 on PC
summary: Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Pedal Set is nearly 60% off. This deal is for a refurbished unit directly from Logitech with a 1-year warranty. It's highlighted as ideal for games like Forza Horizon 6 on PC.

headline: Video shows scene of Bedford train crash as passenger describes aftermath
summary: A video captures the scene of a train crash in Bedford. A passenger described the crash as feeling like a "bomb explosion." The aftermath of the incident is detailed by eyewitness accounts.

headline: What we know so far about Bedford train crash
summary: Two East Midlands Railway trains collided in Bedford. Emergency services are currently on the scene. Further details about the incident are being gathered and reported.

headline: PM under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers to set timetable for exit
summary: The Prime Minister faces pressure from Labour MPs and ministers. They are urging the PM to establish a timetable for exit. The transport secretary is reportedly advising Starmer on this matter.

headline: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
summary: The US announced a ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hezbollah. This agreement follows concerns about escalating clashes. The deal aims to prevent undermining an existing US-Iran war-ending agreement.
